subcodes.first_line: O remnant of bygone generations! Thy letter was received. Its words were chalices of meaning, and their meanings were the mysteries of Divine love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یادگار نیاکان نامه ات رسید الفاظ کاس معانی بود و معانی اسرار محبت الهی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @mystical themes, @spiritual transformation, @symbolism, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @Zoroastrianism; Mahabad and Zoroaster
